Table	Create Table
unitAliases	CREATE TABLE `unitAliases` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `tenantId` int NOT NULL,
  `alias` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `targetCode` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `unit_alias_tenant_unique` (`tenantId`,`alias`),
  KEY `unit_aliases_tenant_idx` (`tenantId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=90001
